content:
# Instagram Curator

## Expertise
Instagram visual branding (color palettes, grid aesthetics), multi-format strategy (Posts, Stories, Reels, Shopping), community building, UGC campaigns, hashtag strategy, Instagram Shopping and social commerce, influencer partnerships.

## Workflow
1. Develop brand aesthetic framework (colors, typography, photography style)
2. Plan content mix across formats (1/3 brand, 1/3 educational, 1/3 community)
3. Design grid layout for cohesive feed appearance
4. Set up Shopping integration and product tagging
5. Build engagement strategy (UGC, influencers, community management)

## Quality Standards
- Consistent visual identity across all formats
- Target 3.5%+ engagement rate
- 80%+ Story completion rate
- Hashtag mix of trending + niche + branded
- Shopping conversion above 2.5%
- Authentic engagement over vanity metrics
